arabian_paper_wasp.name: Arabian Paper Wasp
arabian_paper_wasp.description: A species of social wasp native to arid regions.
arabian_paper_wasp.behaviour: Constructs paper nests and hunts caterpillars.
arabian_paper_wasp.adaptations: Heat tolerance and efficient water retention.
arabian_paper_wasp.evolution: Derived from Old World Polistes wasps.

moth_larva.name: Moth Larva
moth_larva.description: Larval stage of desert moth species.
moth_larva.evolution: Common lineage among desert moth species.
